pi_items.source: task.json description (line 5) and verifier.py (line 51) both specify event name as 'Department All-Hands'
task.json description: 'Time: 2:00 PM (14:00)' and verifier.py (line 74) checks for hour == 14
task.json description specifies '2:00 PM (14:00)' implying 14:00, and verifier.py (line 74) allows 0-5 minute tolerance

RFC 5545 iCalendar standard (https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc5545) confirms BYDAY=1MO represents first Monday of month. Export_result.sh (line 93) retrieves full RRULE field containing 'FREQ=MONTHLY;BYDAY=1MO' of which BYDAY=1MO is correct subset
task.json description: 'Recurrence: Monthly...' and verifier.py (lines 84-86) validates rrule_type == 'monthly'

task.json description: 'on the First Monday of the month (do NOT schedule it for a specific date)' specifies floating recurrence. Verifier.py (lines 97-110) distinguishes month_by='day' (floating) from month_by='date' (fixed). Export_result.sh (line 95) retrieves month_by field
task.json description: 'First Monday' and verifier.py (line 105) checks weekday.upper() == 'MO'
task.json description: 'First Monday' (first = 1st occurrence) and verifier.py (lines 105, 109) validates byday == '1'

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic calendar event in Odoo 17 named 'Department All-Hands' with start time of 14:00 (2:00 PM) and duration of 1 hour, scheduled to begin on the first Monday of the upcoming month. The event recurs monthly using RFC 5545 RRULE format (FREQ=MONTHLY;BYDAY=1MO), configured as a floating recurrence that always falls on the first Monday of each month regardless of the calendar date.
